title: Karnataka High Court upholds CBSE decision to debar student found with mobile during board exam
description: The Karnataka High Court recently upheld the Central Board of Secondary Examination's (CBSE) decision to debar a 12th standard student from appearing in board examinations for the academic years 2025-26 and 2026-27, after he was found to have a mobile phone in his pocket while taking an exam [CBSE v Donthi Satvik Reddy].A Bench of Chief Justice Vibhu Bhakru and Justice CM Poonacha said that it could not interfere with an expert body's policy decision in such matters. "(Under revised rules introd
